title: epilobium angustifolium subsp. macrophyllum
intro: Epilobium angustifolium subsp. macrophyllum, also known as Fireweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the willowherb family, Onagraceae. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of phenolic compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Fireweed have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Fireweed can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
